Package com.saperion.wf

Class ActorInfoImpl

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.wf.WorkflowDataHolder

All Implemented Interfaces:
ActorInfo, Serializable
public final class ActorInfoImpl extends WorkflowDataHolder implements ActorInfo
Actor info class.
